programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The neighbours don't share Clare's enthusiasm for Halloween, so this year she has to tone it down a bit. And Mitch and Cam host a costume party.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: To avoid spending Spring Break with his mum, Adam housesits Erica's downtown apartment. Barry and the JTP hope to become a boyband sensation.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Strangest Affair of All Time: When Murray goes out of town, Jane Bales attempts to make a power grab at the Ottoman Empire, forcing Beverly to retaliate.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Calvin the over-enthusiastic groom plans a monster Scottish wedding at Loch Ness for him and his bride-to-be, Leanne.

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: 0: The builders enter the Lego Masters bakery, where they must choose an object to replicate with Lego. Whose dupe will look like the real deal.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire throw Luke the biggest birthday party a boy could want. But when Cameron appears as a clown named Fizbo, it sets off a chain of events that ends in hospital.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The race takes a spiritual turn in the ancient Cambodian kingdom of Angkor Wat. But which team will tap out when lunch has more legs than expected?

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as Jazz and Inga come under the spotlight once again. Philip gets into hot water with Georgia. Angus is inspired to start dating older women.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, The Black Pearl, is hampered by debts, kitchen problems and three owners who all want to run things their way.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon's got his work cut out at J Willy's in Indiana - most of the food is from a can or the freezer, and they're a million dollars in debt.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The group's fractured dynamic looms large at the sixth Commitment Ceremony, and one couple are hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Harsh truths are laid bare as homestays begin, with family and friends rather unhelpfully wading in to one couple's relationship.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: Knockabout comedy. A Las Vegas casino-owner sets up a unique game for six punters: a race across America, hunting for $2m. Starring John Cleese, Rowan Atkinson and Whoopi Goldberg.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart fakes his school report so that Homer will let him and Lisa go to Kamp Krusty. But the summer camp turns out to be a sweatshop and Bart leads an uprising..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge and the kids take a seaside holiday, Homer is unwittingly tempted by a British femme fatale (Olivia Colman).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa is accused of murdering his girlfriend aboard a cruise ship. Meanwhile, Kent Brockman decides to make a crime podcast.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Odd couple Skinner and Chalmers embark on an 800-mile road trip to Cincinnati for an administrators convention.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa calls her teacher a hack and refuses to apologise. Then she learns Ms Hoover's private pain.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As Comic Book Guy and his wife Kumiko debate whether to have a baby, his awesome origin story is revealed.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds his old teacher's diary and learns a surprising secret. Then Lisa discovers an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Coronation Street, Love Island, Countdown, Clarkson's Farm, Gary Barlow's Food and Wine Tour: Australia and Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Adolescence, 99 to Beat, Coronation Street, David Blaine: Do Not Attempt, Big Night of Musicals by The National Lottery and Building Britain's Superhomes.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time it's Adolescence, Tribe with Bruce Parry, and Bad Dog Academy. Also Tempting Fortune, The Yorkshire Vet, and Million Dollar Secret.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: With his cover boy looks and cut-glass accent, Adam comes straight off the slopes at Verbier to meet 'ex-pat brat' Sophie. Can diamond in the rough Kevin charm glamazon Meguel.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Colin was born with a birth defect that resulted in a missing leg. With a shared sense of humour, he hits it off with phlebotomist Tracey, but will he reveal his disability.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Adolescence, 99 to Beat, Coronation Street, David Blaine: Do Not Attempt, Big Night of Musicals by The National Lottery and Building Britain's Superhomes.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time it's Adolescence, Tribe with Bruce Parry, and Bad Dog Academy. Also Tempting Fortune, The Yorkshire Vet, and Million Dollar Secret.

programme.title: Don't Spook the Bride
programme.desc: The Day of the Dead One: Fiery bride Jenna is in for a scary surprise as her fiancé Nathan is planning a Mexican Day of the Dead themed wedding for her.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Reece, who is ex-military, plans a wedding with an army twist. But his bride Lucy would prefer something in a castle.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The fourth member of the Keane family arrives. Cleo struggles with guilt. Pearl tries to build bridges between torn families. And Diane confides in Tony and Leela.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family are invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football, but an incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things awkward for Gloria and Claire.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: On the kids' first day back at school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire's coping with an empty nest.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family supports Manny's new interest - fencing. It turns out he's pretty good at it, but Jay's proud enthusiasm triggers an old childhood wound for Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: With a history of giving bad gifts, Claire is determined to surprise Phil with an amazing anniversary present - a private performance by Izzy LaFontaine.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire throw Luke the biggest birthday party a boy could want. But when Cameron appears as a clown named Fizbo, it sets off a chain of events that ends in hospital.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Sante La Brea, a health food restaurant in Hollywood. But there's nothing glamorous about this eatery as owner Dean faces financial ruin.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Cafe 36 in Chicago. Husband-and-wife team Terry and Carol are stuck in the past and their head chef's lax attitude is driving away customers.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The homestays continue, but real-world problems are putting all of the couples under strain. And there's a devastating confession.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Distrust and uncertainty are hanging in the air like a bad smell after the homestays. So what better time for the penultimate dinner party.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a singing sensation, while Homer becomes a new man. But when Cletus turns on his fans he ruins everything.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Do Pizza Bots Dream of Electric Guitars: Homer tries to reunite a mechanical band from his youth, but film and TV creator JJ Abrams gets hold of them first.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns gets into the plant-based burger business. But Lisa is convinced that he has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Panic on the Streets of Springfield: Lisa develops an imaginary friendship with a morose British singer. Homer gets a powerful truck.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa's old friend Gus wants his help at the helm of his fast-food empire, leading to a Succession-style plot of corporate espionage. With John Lithgow.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart ends up idolising Homer after accompanying him to work, and resolves to grow up just like him. But Lisa and Hugh Jackman have some alarming news for him..

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: Our teams go back to school at an extraordinary floating classroom on Cambodia's Tonlé Sap Lake. But who'll come a cropper after a hard-graft harvesting task.

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire
programme.desc: Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor disguises himself as a female housekeeper so that he can spend more time with his kids.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: Unrestrained reboot of the franchise defined by a ruthless extraterrestrial killer whose name says it all... and it's had a DNA upgrade. All the better to kill you with, my dear.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, Britain's Got Talent, The Thief, His Wife and the Canoe, Romeo and Duet, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, Roar, and Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers tune in to Eurovision, Beat the Chasers, The Queen's Platinum Jubilee Celebration, The Repair Shop, and horror film Drag Me to Hell.

programme.title: Naked Attraction's Best Naughty Bits
programme.desc: We celebrate Naked Attraction's biggest and best audacious, attention-grabbing characters, from 75-year-old bisexual Ian to Shaida, who was looking for the dad of her future kids.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Visual glazing enhancer (window cleaner) Daniel bonds with Margot Robbie lookalike Lora over nostril waxing and raving, but is he over his ex? Fireman Mark fans Ellie's flame.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, Britain's Got Talent, The Thief, His Wife and the Canoe, Romeo and Duet, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, Roar, and Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay plans a family trip to Palm Springs to celebrate New Year at what he thinks is a great hotel. But the accommodation turns out to be less than stellar.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The fourth member of the Keane family arrives. Cleo struggles with guilt. Pearl tries to build bridges between torn families. And Diane confides in Tony and Leela.
